case_title: CAMERON GROSSMAN CLER VS. RUSSELL BRODMERKLE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-17-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEBRUARY-17-2016 BY HON. DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF APPEARS; THE DEFENDANT RUSSELL BRODMERKLE APPEARS. THE MATTER IS HEARD AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK M.L.MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT.506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-17-2016 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED JAN-08-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRODMERKLE, RUSSELL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLER, CAMERON GROSSMAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRODMERKLE, RUSSELL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,298.00 FILED BY CLER, CAMERON GROSSMAN AS TO DEFENDANT BRODMERKLE, RUSSELL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-17-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
